summary: Critical failure: workflow references missing test file (SecretRotationValidator.Tests.ps1), line 35—will fail immediately on execution. Script logic is solid (proper parameter validation, error handling), but duplicates object-normalization code in Get-RotationReport (lines 79–90) and Invoke-SecretRotationValidator (lines 116–130)—extract helper. PowerShell lacks Set-StrictMode/-ErrorActionPreference. Workflow structure is clean; validates well. Not shippable as-is.
